loan_contract_no.default: select max(loan_contract_no) from sc_lon_m_contract where loan_type = 'ส' and begining_of_contract >= sysdate - 3
loan_contract_no.text: เลขที่สัญญา

text1.text: ผู้รับจำนำ

text2.text: ผู้รับจำนำ

root.sql: SELECT (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, extract ( day from ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) ) as begin_day, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'MONTH') as begin_month, extract ( year from ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) ) + 543 as begin_year, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as memname, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no, sc_mem_m_member_address.moo, pka_com_function.fp_get_sub_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.subdistrict_code )as add_tambol, sc_mem_m_member_address.road, sc_mem_m_member_address.soi, pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) as add_distinct, pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) as add_province, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.manager_name as group_manager_name, si_security_user.user_name , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share ,'!text1_1!' as text1 ,'!text2_1!' as text2 , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_member_work_info, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr, sc_mem_m_member_address, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status , si_security_user ,sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_mem_m_share_mem WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status ) and ( si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' ) and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no =sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no /*WHERE*/ --AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'ส65000004' ) ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ASC
